field_notes.id: Primitive i64 fixture; does not prove runtime keep-alive response behavior.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound keep_alive packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive id fixture only; do not infer runtime keep-alive response behavior, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
